name: Tofu Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Grated Mozzarella, Swiss or Muenster cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the tofu and mix with parmesan and garlic.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Oil a baking dish. Layer noodles, sauce, cheese mixture, mushrooms, and tofu.
4. Top with noodle layer covered in sauce and cheese.
5. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or 400°F (200°C) for 35 minutes.
